Instruction: Walk straight forward with the glass wall on your left. When you reach the corner at the end of the glass wall, turn left. Walk towards the green door ahead, then turn right into the long hallway. Continue straight down this hallway, keeping the white railing on your right and the light green wall on your left. Pass the first two green doors on your left. Keep walking straight and stop in the hallway just past the third green door on your left, which features a small Santa Claus ornament hanging from its handle. This is your destination.
